CustomField.description: [CDD NE Wave 1] The division of the user that creates the opportunity.
CustomField.formula: IF( Owner.Division == $Label.CDDName, $Label.CDDAccronym, IF( Owner.Division == $Label.IDDName, $Label.IDDAccronym, IF( Owner.Division == $Label.MBDName, $Label.MBDAccronym, '' )))
CustomField.label: Division
